Hero.subtitle: Premium quality custom jerseys, hoodies, and team apparel. Design online, delivered to your door.

About.title: ABOUT SPORT CITY
About.p1: Founded in 1989, Sport City has been the go-to destination for local teams, schools, and fitness enthusiasts looking for premium custom apparel. We believe that what you wear affects how you play.
About.p2: Using state-of-the-art printing technology and high-performance fabrics, we bring your vision to life. Whether you need a single custom hoodie or uniforms for an entire league, we deliver quality without compromise.

Services.title: WHAT WE OFFER
Services.subtitle: Everything you need to create the perfect team uniform or personal athletic wear.
Services.s1_desc: Screen printing, sublimation, and embroidery for any design.
Services.s2_desc: Full kits for soccer, basketball, volleyball, and more.
Services.s3_desc: Shop our collection of premium blank athletic apparel.

Collection.title: OUR EXTENSIVE COLLECTION
Collection.subtitle: Beyond custom printing, we offer a massive catalog of ready-to-wear sports clothing, accessories, and gear for every athlete.
Collection.visit_text: We carry top brands and our own premium line of athletic wear. Visit our shop to browse the full collection or talk to us about outfitting your entire organization.

Location.title: VISIT OUR SHOP
Location.subtitle: Come see our materials in person, try on sizes, or talk to our design specialists about your team's needs.
Location.address_val2: Sports City Area (Al-Madina Al-Riyadiya), Amman, Jordan

CTA.title: READY TO CREATE YOUR GEAR?
CTA.subtitle: Use our interactive design tool to customize your apparel exactly how you want it.
